name: cutListOptimize
invariants: output.ok === false || (typeof output.result.wastePct === 'number' && Number.isFinite(output.result.wastePct) && output.result.wastePct >= 0 && output.result.wastePct <= 100)
_note: First-fit-decreasing bin-packing. Sanitises every numeric via cpNum (NaN/Infinity/string → 0); stockLength floors to 1, kerf/cost to >=0. A cut longer than the (sanitised) stock rejects with 'exceeds stock length'. An empty/all-non-positive cut set rejects with 'no valid cuts'. materialCost is null (never $0) when no per-board cost is supplied. No NaN ever leaks into boardsNeeded/wastePct/totalCutLength/layout. Pure deterministic compute, no STATE, no_db never.
